## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and KT to discuss potential employment opportunities at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is a rapidly growing startup (6.1M ARR) that leverages AI-powered workflows for content creation and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [The company uses a pod structure with managing editors overseeing 3-5 accounts and 3-5 writers](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [KT has a background in marketing, writing, and editing, with experience managing teams](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in continuing discussions about potential roles](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [Marcel founded fwd.digital after extensive experience in content marketing and publications](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Company recently closed Series A funding of $12M](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Rapid growth: 6.1M ARR, doubling in size in the last 6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [56 deals on waitlist, actively scaling the team](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach

  - [Uses AI-powered workflows to streamline content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Workflows cover research, outlining, drafting, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Combines AI assistance with human expertise for high-quality output](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Serves diverse clients across industries (tech, fintech, health, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)

### KT's Background and Preferences

  - [Experience in marketing, writing (including true crime), and B2B SaaS content](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Currently working as an editor, managing a team of writers](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Enjoys research, creating systems for writers, and mentorship](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Prefers a mix of deep work and some client interaction, but not constant customer-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)

### Role Structure and Expectations

  - [Current structure: Managing editors oversee 3-5 accounts and 3-5 writers](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Weekly 30-minute client checkpoints](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Potential for evolution in team structure and specialization](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Emphasis on using AI as a tool to enhance human capabilities, not replace them](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Compensation Discussion

  - [KT's current compensation: $80K](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Marcel indicated potential to exceed this amount](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Further details on compensation package to be shared separately](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send KT role details, including compensation package information](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
  - [Set up introduction between KT and Kyle (former client, now team member)](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
  - [Continue discussions about potential roles at fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/6N6YWkny5n6va7mxw_b6i6sdzJZAach5?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
